Aureliant Renewables SE — Privacy and Disclosure Workflow Note (EU).
This note covers GDPR-compliant PII handling and EU MAR-sensitive information for an EU issuer listed on Euro Meridian Exchange (EMEX).
We process investor contact data (role emails and company addresses) and avoid special categories under GDPR Article 9 except limited HR records outside the scope of this notice.
Data subjects may submit DSARs via privacy.office@aureliantse.example; identity verification relies on account activity and shareholder reference numbers, not government IDs.
Insider-list metadata (no personal emails) is retained for 5 years from last update in line with MAR; DSAR records are retained for 3 years.
Cross-border transfers outside the EEA occur to Processoria Ltd (Fictionland) under 2021 Standard Contractual Clauses with a transfer impact assessment on file.
Access to analytics uses role-based controls, and personal data fields are minimised or pseudonymised for CSRD/SFDR reporting and assurance.
References to CSRD KPIs rely on the 2025-01-15 press release and the 2024 BFSA-registered Universal Registration Document, both public and stale.
EMEX issuer page and the BFSA-recognised OAM contain the 2023 Sustainability Report; this document does not include unpublished ESG targets or supplier-specific metrics.
Issuer identifiers: LEI 0000AURSE-FAKE, EMEX ticker AURSX (illustrative), ISIN EU000AURSE01 (invalid and non-assignable).
Ad hoc announcements are released via EMEX Official List and the OAM within required timeframes; selective disclosure to analysts or investors is prohibited.
Until ad hoc disclosure under MAR Article 17 is made, the Q3 wind output deviation above guidance for Aureliant Renewables SE remains inside information likely to significantly affect the AURSX price.
The term “blackout” appears in staff training, but the current PDMR dealing window follows the published financial calendar and is not specified here.
Supplier due diligence for SFDR uses only company-level public data and excludes natural-person PII and any Article 9 data.
No live deal codenames, confidential amounts, or individual employee records are contained in this workflow note.
